title: Beef Stroganoff
recipe: Brown the beef in a skillet. Stir in the mushroom soup and drained mushrooms. Simmer on low heat for 10–15 minutes until meat is tender. Just before serving, stir in the sour cream. Serve over hot cooked egg noodles.

title: Classic Potato Salad
recipe: Mix mayo, mustard, salt, and pepper in a large bowl. Fold in the potatoes, eggs, and celery. Chill for at least 2 hours before serving.

title: Oven-Baked Chicken
recipe: Dip chicken in melted butter, then coat in the breadcrumb/cheese mixture. Bake at 375°F for 45–50 minutes until golden and juices run clear.

title: A-1 Meatloaf
recipe: Combine all ingredients in a large bowl. Shape into a loaf in a shallow baking pan. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour. Let stand 10 minutes before slicing.

title: Tuna Noodle Casserole
recipe: Combine tuna, soup, milk, noodles, and peas. Pour into a greased casserole dish. Top with crushed potato chips. Bake at 375°F for 20–25 minutes until bubbly.

title: Chili Con Carne
recipe: Brown beef and onion; drain fat. Add beans, tomato sauce, and spices. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes to blend flavors.

title: Snickerdoodles
recipe: Cream shortening and sugar. Add eggs. Mix in dry ingredients. Roll into 1-inch balls. Roll balls in cinnamon-sugar mixture. Bake on ungreased sheet at 400°F for 8–10 minutes.

title: Baked Beans
recipe: Mix beans, sugar, mustard, and ketchup in a baking dish. Top with bacon pieces. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour until thickened.

title: Classic Macaroni and Cheese
recipe: Melt butter in a pan, stir in flour, salt, and pepper. Gradually add milk, stirring until thickened. Add 1.5 cups of cheese until melted. Mix with macaroni. Pour into dish, top with remaining cheese. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.

title: Slow Cooker Pot Roast
recipe: Place vegetables in slow cooker. Top with roast. Combine soup mix and water; pour over meat. Cover and cook on Low for 8-10 hours or High for 5-6 hours.

title: Old Fashioned Pancakes
recipe: Sift dry ingredients together. Make a well and add milk, egg, and butter. Mix until smooth. Pour onto a hot griddle and cook until golden on both sides.

title: Peanut Butter Cookies
recipe: Mix all ingredients until smooth. Roll into 1-inch balls. Place on baking sheet and flatten with a fork in a crisscross pattern. Bake at 350°F for 10-12 minutes.

title: Banana Bread
recipe: Mix butter into mashed bananas. Add sugar, egg, vanilla, salt, and soda. Mix in flour. Pour into greased loaf pan. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.

title: Porcupine Meatballs
recipe: Mix beef, rice, 1/2 cup water, onion, and seasonings. Shape into 1 1/2-inch balls. In a large skillet, mix tomato sauce, 1 cup water, and Worcestershire sauce. Bring to a boil. Add meatballs. Cover and simmer for 45 minutes until rice is tender.

title: Stuffed Peppers
recipe: Cut tops off peppers and remove seeds. Cook peppers in boiling water for 5 mins; drain. Brown beef and onion. Add rice, salt, pepper, and half the tomato sauce. Stuff peppers. Stand peppers in a baking dish. Pour remaining sauce over them. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.

title: Swedish Meatballs
recipe: Combine all ingredients except gravy. Shape into small balls and brown in a skillet. Drain fat. Pour beef gravy over meatballs. Cover and simmer for 15-20 minutes. Serve over noodles or mashed potatoes.

title: Cornbread
recipe: Combine dry ingredients. Stir in milk, egg, and shortening. Beat until smooth. Pour into greased 8x8 pan. Bake at 425°F for 20-25 minutes.

title: American Goulash
recipe: Brown beef and onion. Stir in tomato sauce and seasonings. Add 2 cups water and the dry macaroni. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer covered for 20 minutes until macaroni is tender.

title: Baked Ziti
recipe: Cook ziti and drain. Mix pasta with sauce and ricotta. Layer half in a baking dish, top with half the mozzarella. Add remaining pasta and remaining cheeses. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes until bubbly.

title: Shepherd's Pie
recipe: Brown beef and onion. Stir in vegetables and gravy. Pour into a casserole dish. Spread mashed potatoes over the top. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes until potatoes are golden.

title: Apple Crisp
recipe: Place apples in a greased baking dish. Mix remaining ingredients until crumbly and sprinkle over apples. Bake at 375°F for 30-35 minutes until apples are tender.
